config_notes.config/adapter.example.json: Demo database router config. Copy to config/adapter.local.json before real use.
config_notes.config/spatial.eez.example.json: Demo spatial router config. Downloads public Marine Regions EEZ GPKG into data/eez/ and imports PostGIS when enabled.
config_notes.config/adapter.ais_collector.example.jso: Demo websocket collector config. Copy to a local config before real use.
